name: io.github.kakarot-dev/deepmiro
description: Simulate hundreds of AI agents to predict how communities react to events and policies

environmentVariables.name: DEEPMIRO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your DeepMiro API key (get one free at https://deepmiro.org)

environmentVariables.name: MIROFISH_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override for self-hosted engine URL (default: https://api.deepmiro.org)
